artifacts.description: Removed IRR case from derivation_subst (eliminated 1 sorry)
Removed IRR cases and IRRSoundness import
Removed IRR cases from substDerivation and liftDerivationWith
Added Phase 4 infrastructure: atoms_of_set, fresh_for_set, helper theorems for per-witness strictness. 5 sorries remain (3 key lemmas + 2 legacy).
Phase 4 analysis and proof strategy handoff

partial_progress.details: Phases 1-3 complete. Phase 4 structure implemented: added atoms_of_set, fresh_for_set definitions and helper theorems. existsTask_strict_fresh_atom compiles and calls helper theorems. Key lemmas still sorried: exists_fresh_for_g_content (freshness existence), fresh_for_g_content_some_decided_false (finding decided-false fresh atom), fresh_Gp_seed_consistent Case 1 (substitution argument).
key_insights: atoms_of_set(M) = Set.univ for any MCS M (every atom appears in some formula of M)
Fresh atoms must be for g_content(M), not M itself
If q is fresh for g_content(M), then G(neg(q)) not in M (key lemma proven)

verification.notes: Build passes. Phase 4 structure in place. 5 sorries in CanonicalIrreflexivity.lean: 3 for key lemmas (freshness existence, decided-false fresh atom, seed consistency Case 1), 2 legacy (naming_set_consistent).

review_reason: Phase 4 structural work complete. Key theorem fresh_for_g_content_implies_not_always_neg is PROVEN. Remaining sorries require counting/cardinality arguments that need more time.
